19997864.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
19997864.transcript: We've got it backed into a corner! Let's end this!

31417537.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
31417537.transcript: Back down and the skies are doomed!

32412928.label: PL0200_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
32412928.transcript: Leave the front line to me.

35325066.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
35325066.transcript: Let's proceed one step at a time.

39109672.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
39109672.transcript: We can end this now and forever!

46057488.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
46057488.transcript: It's not over yet! Hang on!

74095039.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
74095039.transcript: You've bested us in the past, but no more!

78356520.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
78356520.transcript: Agreed. That is the very essence of knighthood.

78583328.label: PL0200_vo_ETC_box_open_3
78583328.transcript: Now what do we have here?

78878453.label: PL0200_vo_ETC_lockon_2
78878453.transcript: This crew is under my protection!

85574027.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
85574027.transcript: Push on and triumph is ours!

100165011.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
100165011.transcript: You fight as if you have a death wish!

118900656.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
118900656.transcript: I'm just happy I could hold my own against our vests.

146348212.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_weakpoint
146348212.transcript: I'll take note of our tactics.

147400967.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
147400967.transcript: These next moments are crucial. Let's collect ourselves.

166950064.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
166950064.transcript: Let us show you true camaraderie!

167773273.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
167773273.transcript: Now on to the main event!

170457826.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
170457826.transcript: You dealt with them in short order. Excellent work.

183997549.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
183997549.transcript: I didn't know you could be so sentimental.

218891381.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
218891381.transcript: This is an all-out war! Are you ready?

235877092.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
235877092.transcript: He's only showing us the tip of the iceberg.

247358771.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
247358771.transcript: It doesn't matter the foe! We won't back down!

250175363.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
250175363.transcript: There's always a path to victory!

272901348.label: PL0200_vo_ATK_charge_line_7
272901348.transcript: We will prevail! I know it!

288403732.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
288403732.transcript: Their skill is evident. Proceed carefully.

288949551.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
288949551.transcript: Indeed. We make a fearsome pair.

289375019.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
289375019.transcript: All of our practice paid off!

294803512.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
294803512.transcript: Then we follow it to the end.

308845645.label: PL0200_vo_ETC_lockon_3
308845645.transcript: Apologies, but you will let us pass.

311018100.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
311018100.transcript: You have my blade whenever you need it.

322730804.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
322730804.transcript: We need only finish this abomination!

324515592.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
324515592.transcript: Shall I take the lead on the next attack?

330219168.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
330219168.transcript: You hold no sway over us!

352180951.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
352180951.transcript: Now you've got me fired up too!

353923290.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
353923290.transcript: The monsters in this skydome aren't too bad either.

366997076.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
366997076.transcript: After seeing your technique, I still have much to learn.

374121147.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
374121147.transcript: Moving forward is our only option.

395958362.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0000
395958362.transcript: It was nothing. You're not straining yourself, are you?

422040309.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
422040309.transcript: Sorry, did I get carried away with the frost?

428274884.label: PL0200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
428274884.transcript: Fear not. You have my support.

444861715.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
444861715.transcript: Two practitioners of ice and blade are better than one.

452353517.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
452353517.transcript: We made quick work of them.

455652256.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
455652256.transcript: Underestimate us at your own peril!

457721591.label: PL0200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
457721591.transcript: Well, shall we call it a day?

466141326.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
466141326.transcript: Keep it up for the next one!

470669528.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
470669528.transcript: Oh, does somebody wanna play when this is all over?

471149940.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
471149940.transcript: Let's push through this twisted place.

476542228.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
476542228.transcript: I must say, you are quite the martial artist.

494415972.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
494415972.transcript: How many peepers peeped a pickled... Never mind.

517677522.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
517677522.transcript: You were like elegance given form.

519375651.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
519375651.transcript: Let's just focus on the path ahead.

526743959.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
526743959.transcript: Do your worst! We won't back down!

539512395.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
539512395.transcript: We've grown stronger than ever! Let's prove it!

546731284.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
546731284.transcript: We need to hurry to the monastery.

552412260.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
552412260.transcript: Take it from a fellow knight, that was sublime.

555703297.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
555703297.transcript: I thank you for the protection.

559522401.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
559522401.transcript: Earning my good graces to use Vyrn as a test subject?

561335253.label: PL0200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
561335253.transcript: Right! Look out for any large attacks!

582524979.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
582524979.transcript: How dare you! Vyrn is not a science experiment!

584767105.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
584767105.transcript: Defeat at your hand pushed me to improve myself.

597770017.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
597770017.transcript: Truly? He's among the most honorable knights I know.

599062394.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
599062394.transcript: Oh, the fun's just beginning, Rackam!

607199008.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
607199008.transcript: You've stalled us for far too long!

628842402.label: PL0200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
628842402.transcript: Well done. Be proud of yourselves.

637166807.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
637166807.transcript: Your swords are brittle against our might!

648314945.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
648314945.transcript: We're more alike than I'd care to admit.

654232176.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
654232176.transcript: Thanks. That means a lot coming from you.

656240230.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
656240230.transcript: We have the advantage! Now press it!

662048904.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
662048904.transcript: Avatar of destruction or not, we won't waver!

664520455.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
664520455.transcript: Hmm. Why do I get the feeling you've more to show?

677142026.label: PL0200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
677142026.transcript: Look for its tell and dodge accordingly!

679562441.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
679562441.transcript: Agreed! What say you to a friendly duel sometime?

681370721.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
681370721.transcript: Eugen, you're the one out of breath.

683274398.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
683274398.transcript: How do you constantly push your limits?

684766963.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
684766963.transcript: Leave or we'll remove you by force!

699870606.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
699870606.transcript: You will not harm these skies!

720715428.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
720715428.transcript: I love when a plan comes together!

728778470.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
728778470.transcript: Id, come what may, we will defeat you!

732274566.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
732274566.transcript: Blade and ice, a powerful combination.

752712882.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
752712882.transcript: I think so. That was great!

772978057.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
772978057.transcript: We can't let them delay us!

782079851.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
782079851.transcript: I'll always be by your side.

786397507.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
786397507.transcript: Don't let them lay a finger on Historia!

786418378.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
786418378.transcript: How do we face this monstrosity?

790756271.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
790756271.transcript: Indeed! Let's keep up the pressure!

790798379.label: PL0200_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_4
790798379.transcript: We need you back out there!

793544367.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
793544367.transcript: Oh, are we the same age?

796890284.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
796890284.transcript: All credit goes to you, Vane.

805568521.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
805568521.transcript: And you fight like the raging sea.

807431592.label: PL0200_vo_DUO_recovery_C_NP0000
807431592.transcript: Now I'm the one in your debt, Lyria.

833293453.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
833293453.transcript: You think so low of me?

851610499.label: PL0200_vo_DUO_recovery_B_NP0000
851610499.transcript: If I worried you, I'm sorry.

852610730.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
852610730.transcript: How much ammo do you have left?

861234728.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0000
861234728.transcript: Well, you did sic Bahamut on them.

866453853.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
866453853.transcript: Unity is the difference between a knightly order and common troops.

868119691.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
868119691.transcript: There's no foe we cannot topple! All together!

870404494.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
870404494.transcript: After we finish this quest, how's a homemade meal sound?

876744891.label: PL0200_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
876744891.transcript: My will lives in this blade!

886155718.label: PL0200_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_NP0000
886155718.transcript: Guess this makes you the guardian.

887640225.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
887640225.transcript: Few measure up to your mastery.

894273974.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
894273974.transcript: We're making quick work of them!

906674801.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
906674801.transcript: The most formidable crew in the skies!

909576225.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
909576225.transcript: We've no time to waste on this false wolf!

913368856.label: PL0200_vo_ETC_pic_line_1
913368856.transcript: I'll take a little of this.

939960787.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
939960787.transcript: A stable offense with room for improvement. B+.

965727286.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
965727286.transcript: Don't let your guard down yet.

966320370.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
966320370.transcript: Great work, team! Keep it up!

974806066.label: PL0200_vo_SP_charge_speak_ares_2
974806066.transcript: Let's put an end to this!

997310887.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
997310887.transcript: Find a path to victory and take it!

1018467623.label: PL0200_vo_SP_charge_name_3
1018467623.transcript: Go forth into the icy beyond!

1034236922.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
1034236922.transcript: And your flame could melt its scales.

1045454971.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
1045454971.transcript: It's no match for my icy blade!

17999356.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
17999356.transcript: The power of the six dragons never fails to impress.

57841467.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
57841467.transcript: Seems we've kicked the hornet's nest!

85703278.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
85703278.transcript: It amazes me how you can attack from every angle.

90962328.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
90962328.transcript: Your attacks are... well... you fight far beyond the capacity of a mortal.

103713314.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
103713314.transcript: I can only imagine the trials, the tribulations you've shared with your scythe.

110596834.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
110596834.transcript: I'm nothing compared to your aim.

117162479.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
117162479.transcript: Sorry, but this sword doesn't leave my grip.

136164978.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
136164978.transcript: Your support is much appreciated, Beatrix.

137630145.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
137630145.transcript: I had no idea he was capable of such devastation!

148541439.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
148541439.transcript: And they never saw it coming!

152257559.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
152257559.transcript: But good defense provides the opportunity to strike.

167354607.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
167354607.transcript: Arvess is like an extension of yourself!

167898439.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
167898439.transcript: Allow me to begin the next assault.

191809568.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
191809568.transcript: You certainly know how to make a clean sweep.

202683762.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
202683762.transcript: Don't worry. We're in this together.

213371408.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
213371408.transcript: Yes. I took a vow upon this blade.

248262360.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
248262360.transcript: Your control has gotten much better, Io!

258861239.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
258861239.transcript: Has a nice ring to it.

302321418.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
302321418.transcript: We work well together, don't we?

378885909.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
378885909.transcript: Phew! Your presence is our windfall!

423961797.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
423961797.transcript: You always keep us on an even keel.

453428726.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
453428726.transcript: Yes! It was a decisive blow!

521712682.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
521712682.transcript: Your ensorcelled blades are wonderful. Hypnotizing even.

524634784.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
524634784.transcript: Humor has its place, but this isn't the time.

535872598.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
535872598.transcript: Young Lyria? Is that what you call Lyria?

562921824.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
562921824.transcript: A beautiful thing when two opposing forces become one.

582027845.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
582027845.transcript: Your swordcraft highlights my shortcomings, Yodarha.

591909402.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
591909402.transcript: Trust in me to be your shield.

603375441.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
603375441.transcript: Likewise, Eid. You're one of us now.

605108013.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
605108013.transcript: It's an honor that one of the six dragons finds me worthy.

626464382.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
626464382.transcript: My honor is the oath I swore upon this blade.

628160010.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
628160010.transcript: Your cuts are so pure, unfettered by emotion.

629880998.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
629880998.transcript: Each strike more precise and deadly than the last. How do you do it?

637864108.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
637864108.transcript: Your crushing blow left nothing to be desired, Maglielle.

643537125.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
643537125.transcript: Your Skybound Art was glorious! Like a white dragon in flight!

665196141.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
665196141.transcript: Who knew you would make such a reliable ally?

665270301.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
665270301.transcript: One wrong step and I would've fallen to your void!

712380704.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
712380704.transcript: Then bring them along for training next time!

731412462.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
731412462.transcript: Agreed! None shall pass our bulwark!

750032275.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
750032275.transcript: No, she prefers to stay grounded. Wait.

763629477.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
763629477.transcript: Seems we've found an insatiable ally.

785418280.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
785418280.transcript: Oh, Vern... Now I'm ready to face anything.

790981201.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
790981201.transcript: Yes. More than I'd like to admit.

806351519.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
806351519.transcript: A blade of frost can't compete with fire.

836690714.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
836690714.transcript: Thank you for the assistance, Fediel.

850502428.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
850502428.transcript: Only Rising, huh? Guess I need to fry bigger fish!

867207861.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
867207861.transcript: I know, and I won't fail your expectations.

875273967.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
875273967.transcript: All the finer with you at my side.

895296284.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
895296284.transcript: Shit! You're not just quick, you're quick-witted too!

907772323.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
907772323.transcript: Drills are no substitute for experience.

913037026.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
913037026.transcript: Having someone to protect makes you strong.

914089168.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
914089168.transcript: I admire the loyalty and trust of your pets.

919090055.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
919090055.transcript: Flamek's thunder is something else to behold!

985762339.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
985762339.transcript: That barrage was akin to a meteor shower!

998042386.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
998042386.transcript: Good work. I'll take the vanguard next.

1004301137.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
1004301137.transcript: Your flourishes are hard to miss!

1014407830.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
1014407830.transcript: Actually, I think that's a great idea.

1019033938.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
1019033938.transcript: On to the next foe, Beatrix!

1020121600.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
1020121600.transcript: Yet I sense you could hit even harder.

1070399746.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
1070399746.transcript: It's all in the technique. Actually, I prefer a light weapon.

1071748446.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
1071748446.transcript: Hard to imagine anything left standing after that.

176767603.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
176767603.transcript: Just focus on protecting our rear, will you?

184568743.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
184568743.transcript: That's rich, coming from an eternal.

195756457.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
195756457.transcript: I was thinking more like two blades on a belt.

311179584.label: PL0200_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
311179584.transcript: Here goes... One... Two... Three... Four... Five... Six...

396872135.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
396872135.transcript: For putting on such a carefree mask, you are a ferocious fighter.

423388479.label: PL0200_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
423388479.transcript: One... two... three... four... five... six...

456817333.label: PL0200_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
456817333.transcript: One... two... three... four... five... six... Okay.

635021089.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
635021089.transcript: Battles are won by good analysis.

730500374.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
730500374.transcript: You'll have to teach me that technique, Seofon.

787434570.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200

912902642.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300

1041720633.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
1041720633.transcript: They won't know what hit them.

282403533.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100

582423140.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
